title: Apple raises prices and global markets fall on AI fears

summary: Analysts and advisors offer everything from portfolio strategies to tax tips to optimize personal finances.

summary: The quakes leave at least 235 dead and more than 4,300 injured, and rescue efforts continue among the rubble.

summary: Crude retreats due to increased Gulf supply and easing of conflict fears.
